1 - Claims met, not FFS

ULCERS_MEDICARE Pressure Ulcers and Chronic Ulcers - Medicare Only Claims NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicare data, for having Pressure Ulcers and Chronic Ulcers Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
